core_logic_summary: Synthetic VIX from price: wvf = ((highest(close 22)-low)/highest(close 22))*100. Spikes on fear. Signals when > BB upper or percentile high.
spx_idea_summary: Bottom-fishing signal for call entries. Filter to pause put spreads during spikes. VIX Fix Reversal strategy idea.
notes: No external data needed - purely price-derived. Most promising in batch.

core_logic_summary: Long when VIX crosses under SMA(5) AND NDX > EMA(21). Exit on VIX cross back over or TP/SL/time.
spx_idea_summary: VIX SMA(5) crossunder as universal filter for all bullish strategies. 0DTE: sell put spreads when VIX falling.
notes: Dual confirmation (VIX + trend) is clean. Need intraday VIX for 0DTE timing.

core_logic_summary: Simple momentum of VIX: mom(vix 7). Green=fear declining Red=fear rising. Arrows at extremes.
spx_idea_summary: VIX momentum < 0 = favorable for premium selling. New high in VIX momentum = regime change warning.
notes: Simplest VIX indicator. Good as a quick regime check.

core_logic_summary: Converts VIX to expected daily range: price * (VIX/15.87)/100. Draws upper/lower expected boundaries.
spx_idea_summary: Strike selection beyond expected range. Boundary fade strategy. Daily range filter for all strategies.
notes: VIX/16 should be computed daily for ALL strategies. Critical for strike selection.

core_logic_summary: VIX MA crossunder + price momentum confirmation (mom>mom[1]). Configurable MA type.
spx_idea_summary: Stronger VIX cross signal. Test momentum confirmation layer on top of existing VIX filters.
notes: Overlaps with VIX Crossing. Momentum confirmation is the novel element.

core_logic_summary: Smoothed VIX (RMA 3) vs VIX MA (RMA 10). Cloud fill shows trend. Cross = signal.
spx_idea_summary: VIX downtrend = safe to sell premium. Regime filter.
notes: Overlaps with VIX Crossing and Reversal Scalper. All are VIX MA variants.

core_logic_summary: Monitors VIX option for 200%+ intraday spike = increased hedging. 400%+ = crash imminent.
spx_idea_summary: Crash circuit breaker. HALT all credit spreads when VIX options spike. Could have prevented MEDS disaster.
notes: Uses lookahead_on for daily open. Concept is novel - option-on-option sentiment. Use VVIX as proxy.

core_logic_summary: Full VIX term structure: VIX9D/VIX/3M/6M/1Y. Ratios percentiles regime detection (contango/backwardation).
spx_idea_summary: Regime switch filter: credit spreads only in contango. VIX9D/VIX ratio immediately actionable with our data.
notes: Priority 1 implementation. Missing VIX3M/6M/1Y but VIX9D/VIX is available now.

core_logic_summary: Hull MA = low-lag moving average. Trend from HMA vs HMA[2]. Band visualization.
spx_idea_summary: HMA as trend filter for credit spread direction. Lower lag than EMA for intraday.
notes: Would need shorter period for 0DTE. Could replace EMA in MEDS-style strategies.

core_logic_summary: Classic Ichimoku Cloud: Tenkan Kijun Chikou Senkou A/B. Bullish above cloud.
spx_idea_summary: Too slow for 0DTE. Daily regime filter only. Low priority.
notes: Skip for our purposes. Daily/weekly timeframe tool.
